Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to construct a Log Skeleton dictionary for the given order fulfillment process The scenario describes a typical process but we need to infer the constraints based on common sense and the descriptions We have activities RO CA RI PI QC PO GSL D IC RP We need to provide constraints equivalence always_before always_after never_together activ_freq directly_follows

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Since it is a typical process each activity likely occurs exactly once per case However some might be optional For example maybe quality check is always done Probably all are mandatory

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The scenario says it must be processed through a series of activities implying all are mandatory So we can assume each activity occurs exactly once

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Receive order first then Check Availability then Reserve Items then Pick Items then Quality Check then Pack Order then Generate Shipping Label then Dispatch

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Invoice Customer and Record Payment might happen after dispatch Or concurrently Typically invoice might be generated after dispatch Or after packing

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets assume standard invoice after dispatch Also Record Payment is after invoice So we have a sequence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Always Before if an activity occurs another must have occurred earlier For example Pick Items must have Check Availability before you need to check availability before picking

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Always After is the opposite direction For example if RO occurs then CA must occur later

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Never together would be for mutually exclusive activities In this process all activities are typically present so no such pairs

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Directly follows can be modeled as the linear chain RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Since each activity occurs once per order we can set activ_freq for each activity to 1

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Equivalence can be left empty because the activity frequency already fixes every activity to occur exactly once making additional equivalence constraints unnecessary

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus the dictionary is equivalence empty always_before with the immediate predecessor pairs always_after with the immediate successor pairs never_together empty activ_freq with all activities mapped to 1 and directly_follows equal to the same linear succession pairs
